name: Peachy Yogurt Breakfast Sundae
recipeInstructions:
1. Place sliced peaches in a small bowl.
2. Top with low-fat vanilla yogurt and wheat germ.
3. Garnish with raspberries or blueberries, if desired.
Per Serving: About 190 cal, 11 g pro, 31 g car, 3 g fat, 14% of calories from fat, 5 mg chol, 75 mg sod.
